title: cbNextSimTime: Don't call new cbNextSimTime events during current timestep
body:
Without a fix, registering a new cbNextSimTime callback within a cbNextSimTime callback will infinite loop and never advance the time.

It also fills out the time struct.

I can write a test case for this but I'm not yet sure how the iverilog suite works.

It is my understanding that since cbNextSimTime is one-shot, I need to register a new cbNextSimTime callback within its own callback handler to get a callback for every sim tick. Is that correct?
